# Available Commands

Reference table of all npm scripts available in this project.

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `npm run build` | Build ESM + CJS outputs |
| `npm run build:esm` | Build ESM output only |
| `npm run build:cjs` | Build CJS output only |
| `npm test` | Run test suite with Vitest |
| `npm run lint` | Lint source with ESLint |
| `npm run typecheck` | Type check with TypeScript |
| `npm run format` | Format code with Prettier |
| `npm run check:circular` | Check for circular dependencies |
| `npm run docs` | Generate TypeDoc documentation |
| `npm run docs:check` | Validate TypeDoc configuration |
| `npm run changelog` | Generate changelog with git-cliff |
| `npm run changelog:unreleased` | Show unreleased changes |
| `npm run changelog:preview` | Preview unreleased changes |
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED -->
